channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Challenges Facing LPG as an Alternative Fuel in Australia
item.description: Liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) remains one of the cheapest fuel options in Australia, costing as little as 80c per litre in some cities like Melbourne. Despite being locally produced, lower in emission...

item.title: Investigation unfolds after suspected mass grave with unclaimed bodies found in Kericho cemetery
item.description: A suspected mass grave containing multiple bodies has been discovered at Makaburini Cemetery in Kericho town, sparking shock and demands for probe by residents and human‑rights groups. Initial reports...

item.title: Iranian man detained near UK nuclear submarine base released pending further investigation
item.description: A 34-year-old Iranian man who was arrested after allegedly attempting to enter HM Naval Base Clyde, also known as Faslane, in Argyll and Bute, has been released while police continue their inquiries. ...

item.title: Trillanes files cyberlibel complaints against 18 alleged bagmen and SMNI hosts over bribery allegations
item.description: Former senator Antonio Trillanes IV filed cyberlibel complaints yesterday at the Department of Justice against 18 men who claimed to be former bagmen involved in delivering kickback money, or suitcase...

item.title: GHADC mandates Scheduled Tribe certificates for council election candidates
item.description: The Garo Hills Autonomous District Council (GHADC) in Meghalaya has amended its election rules to require candidates to hold a valid Scheduled Tribe (ST) certificate in order to contest council electi...

item.title: Suspected Iranian-linked group sets fire to Jewish ambulances in London
item.description: Early on Monday morning, a group claiming links to Iran set fire to four ambulances belonging to Hatzola, a volunteer Jewish emergency service, in Golders Green, London. Security footage reportedly sh...

item.title: Leaked DarkSword Exploit Puts Millions of Older iPhones at Risk
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered that a new version of the iPhone hacking tool DarkSword has been publicly leaked on GitHub. This exploit kit targets iPhones and iPads running older versions ...

item.title: Study Reveals Public Misperceptions of Foods' Environmental Impacts
item.description: A new study from the University of Nottingham's School of Psychology shows that people frequently misjudge the environmental impact of everyday foods. Researchers had 168 UK participants sort a wide r...

item.title: US delays airstrikes on Iran as diplomatic talks continue
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced a five-day delay on all planned airstrikes targeting Iranian power plants and other energy facilities. The postponement is meant to allow ongoing discussions be...

item.title: England recovers from drought amid unusually high rainfall, but future weather swings remain a concern
item.description: After four months of above-average rainfall, England has officially recovered from last year's severe drought. February alone brought 170% of the long-term average rainfall, helping replenish water su...

item.title: Tanzania Government Announces 787.5 Billion Shillings Investment for Rural Water Supply in 2026-2030 Programme
item.description: On World Water Day, the Tanzanian government revealed big plans to pump 787.5 billion shillings into rural water projects from 2026 to 2030. This move targets the remaining 1,575 villages that still l...

item.title: Marcos inspects P332-million solar-powered irrigation projects in Camarines Sur benefiting 1,800 farmers
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. visited Camarines Sur on March 23, 2026 to personally inspect the rollout of solar-powered irrigation projects aimed at helping farmers cope with rising fuel prices. Acc...

item.title: Jessie J Hospitalized for MRI After Hitting Head on Car Roof During China Tour, Rules Out Neck Fracture
item.description: British singer Jessie J, known for hits like 'Price Tag,' experienced a health scare while on her No Secrets tour in China. In a video posted to Instagram, the 37-year-old artist was seen struggling t...

item.title: One Wellness Centre and ProSkin Aesthetics Clinic Host Relaxed Event for International Women's Day in Lagos
item.description: This event wey One Wellness Centre and ProSkin Aesthetics Clinic organise for Lagos to mark International Women's Day and Mother's Day no be the normal one wey people dey used to. Instead of the usual...

item.title: EU partners with Finland and Estonia to support Nigeria's digital public services and technical talent programme
item.description: The Government of Finland go lead one big €23 million Team Europe Initiative wey the European Union fully fund to help strengthen Nigeria digital public services and support the rollout of the 3 Milli...

item.title: Global markets rebound after reports of US-Iran talks; oil dives below $100 a barrel
item.description: Global markets staged a strong recovery following reports that President Donald Trump claimed the United States and Iran had held 'productive talks' aimed at reducing tensions in the Middle East. Trum...

item.title: Supreme Court of Canada hears first day of arguments on constitutionality of Quebec's Bill 21 secularism law
item.description: The Supreme Court of Canada began four days of hearings on March 23, 2026, regarding the constitutionality of Quebec's Bill 21, the Act Respecting the Laicity of the State. Enacted in 2019, the law ba...

item.title: Emfuleni municipal services disrupted due to diesel supply issues
item.description: Essential municipal services in Emfuleni have been severely disrupted due to a shortage of diesel, affecting waste collection, electricity maintenance, and firefighting operations. Some fire trucks ha...

item.title: Tanzania and Italy Reinforce Agricultural Partnership Under Mattei Plan
item.description: Tanzania and Italy have reaffirmed their commitment to enhancing cooperation in agriculture with a focus on improving food security, boosting value addition, and sharing technical expertise. The renew...

item.title: Air Canada Plane Collides with Fire Truck on LaGuardia Runway, Killing Two Pilots
item.description: Surveillance footage captured a tragic collision at New York's LaGuardia Airport on Sunday night, 22 March 2026, when an Air Canada Bombardier CRJ-900 aircraft, operating as Jazz 646 from Montreal, st...
